title: TabBorrowParams
description: Params for `tool.tab_borrow`. Moves a *user* tab into the requesting session's Agent Window, recording its original window / index so `tab_return` (or session_stop) can put it back.

confirm.description: Whether to wait for an inline user confirmation overlay (M10 will introduce the UI). Currently ignored: the M8 stub always proceeds when `false` and forwards `true` to a no-op approver.
